Can you give me a summary of the dream?

Rushabh Doshi, the founder of Machinecraft, dreams of significantly expanding the company and its associated ventures. His vision includes achieving a combined turnover of ₹500 Crore by 2030 across Machinecraft, Formpack, and MAPL. He also plans to launch Calftel, an initiative to create portable, low-cost thermoforming factories for rural entrepreneurs, aiming to generate over 500 rural jobs by 2028.
